The event will last for a total of 19 days, marking a significant gathering for members and supporters of the organization.
news.headline: ACB opens registration for 2025 Conference & Convention, happening June 23 to July 11, with in-person part on July 4-11 at Hyatt Regency.

The strategic acquisition encompasses all assets associated with Microbiome Insights, establishing Mapmygenome's prominence in the field.

news.summary: Shares of Pure Storage experienced a decline in after-hours trading on Wednesday, despite the company delivering robust financial results for the first quarter. Even though Pure Storage exceeded earnings expectations for Q1, its stock still dropped. The enterprise data storage firm reported impressive figures, with revenue reaching $403 million, representing a year-over-year increase of 12%. This positive performance was overshadowed by the market reaction, leading to a stock downturn.
news.headline: Pure Storage reported a strong fiscal Q1, but stock fell despite beating earnings. Investors react negatively.

news.summary: Novo Nordisk is experiencing a significant decline in market share to Eli Lilly, which is becoming increasingly evident in Novo Nordisk's stock performance. The competition in the weight-loss sector has resulted in Novo Nordisk losing ground to Eli Lilly, reflecting a shift in the industry dynamics. This trend underscores the growing dominance of Eli Lilly in the market, indicating challenges for Novo Nordisk in maintaining its competitive position.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk losing market share to Eli Lilly, impacting stocks. Shows paradigm shift in weight-loss market battle.

news.summary: A recent report "The Railway Telematics Market: 1st Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's available offerings. The report highlights the significant growth expected in the market for real-time tracking solutions for locomotives, multiple units, and rail wagons in the upcoming years. The railway telematics industry is experiencing a positive outlook, driven by the rising awareness of the advantages of remote monitoring solutions among stakeholders within the railway sector. Anticipated substantial growth in this sector is creating a sense of optimism, reflecting the increasing adoption of telematics technologies.
news.headline: Railway telematics market set to grow substantially, report covers 15 OEMs, 29 aftermarket solutions, and 5 hardware providers.

The forklift industry is experiencing significant transformations, with the integration of IoT technologies playing a key role in driving innovation and development.

news.summary: A company in Jacksonville, Florida, has recently enhanced their BlindSPOT BAS platform, which focuses on Breach and Attack Simulation. OnDefend has integrated Detection and Response Validation into the platform, providing cybersecurity teams with immediate confirmation that their security controls are operational. This update aims to offer real-time proof of the effectiveness of security measures in place.
news.headline: OnDefend expands BlindSPOT with Detection and Response Validation for real-time security proof.

This move is part of the company's strategic growth plan in response to increasing demand for its M365 services. Cox will be leading the sales team to drive revenue and capitalize on the expanding market opportunities. This appointment signifies an important step for SWOOP Analytics as they aim to strengthen their position in the industry.
news.headline: SWOOP Analytics welcomes Jon Cox as new Director of Sales in New York. #M365

news.summary: Renaissance, a renowned global education technology company based in Bloomington, Minnesota, introduced a wide-ranging set of AI literacy lessons via Nearpod on May 29, 2025. These interactive lessons aim to assist teachers in equipping students with the essential knowledge and skills necessary to navigate the potentials and ethical considerations associated with artificial intelligence. Nearpod's platform will serve as a tool to facilitate these lessons, ensuring a dynamic and engaging learning experience for students. This initiative signifies Renaissance's commitment to enhancing education and preparing students (from pre-kindergarten to grade 12) for the evolving landscape shaped by advanced technologies.
news.headline: Renaissance introduces AI literacy resources in Nearpod to aid teachers in preparing students for ethical AI use.

news.summary: Horizon Organic Dairy has welcomed a new executive leader to their team, who brings over 20 years of experience in the food and beverage sector. The individual has a strong passion for premium dairy products. The company, based in Broomfield, Colorado, made this announcement on May 29, 2025. Horizon Organic is renowned as a trailblazer in organic dairy and stands as the largest in its industry.
news.headline: Patricia Stroup named Chief Operating Officer at Horizon Organic Dairy, with over 20 yrs experience. May 29, 2025.

news.summary: A report predicts that the NLP in Healthcare & Life Sciences Market will experience substantial growth, with a projected increase from USD 5.18 billion in 2025 to USD 16.01 billion by 2030. This marks an impressive Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25.3% during the forecast period.
news.headline: NLP in Healthcare & Life Sciences market to reach $16.01 billion by 2030, growing at 25.3% CAGR from $5.18 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Rosemont, Illinois - On May 29, 2025, the Orthopaedic Research and Education Foundation (OREF) revealed that Ivan Tornos has been appointed as the new Chairman and President. OREF is a prominent private nonprofit entity that supports musculoskeletal (MSK) research in various orthopaedic sub-specialties. This decision marks a significant development in the organization's leadership.
news.headline: Zimmer Biomet CEO Ivan Tornos joins OREF Board of Trustees, leading nonprofit in MSK research funding.

news.headline: Stay updated on crypto trends: Get daily news on Bitcoin, DeFi, NFTs & crypto regulation, impacting prices & Web3.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global smartphone market experienced a 15% decline in sales in the first quarter of 2021 compared to the same period last year. Approximately 315 million smartphones were sold during this quarter. The drop in sales can be attributed to various factors, including the ongoing semiconductor shortage and reduced consumer spending due to the economic impact of the pandemic. Despite this decline, some regions saw growth in smartphone sales, with China being a notable exception. The top three smartphone manufacturers during this period were Samsung, Apple, and Xiaomi, with Samsung maintaining its lead in market share.
news.headline: Address poisoning attacks occur in crypto when hackers change addresses. To prevent, ensure secure transactions & verify recipient identity.

news.summary: Insurity, a top provider of cloud-based insurance software, recently shared findings from its 2025 Digital Experience Index, unveiling preferences of P&C insurance customers regarding digital interactions. Amid a growing digital landscape, the data indicates that merely 15% of consumers actually desire a solely digital, self-service experience with their insurers. Many in the industry are prioritizing automation and digital advancements, but this research highlights that a significant majority of customers still value some level of human interaction or assistance in their insurance dealings.
news.headline: Insurity survey: Only 15% of consumers prefer fully digital insurance experience.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, xMEMS Labs, Inc. has unveiled an expansion of its µCooling fan-on-a-chip technology to incorporate solid-state drives (SSDs). This innovation marks the introduction of in-drive active cooling for enterprise E3.S form factor SSDs utilized in AI data centers and NVMe M.2 SSDs found in laptop PCs. Historically, SSD thermal regulation has depended on passive heat spreaders and airflow from system fans, which can be inadequate. The groundbreaking technology by xMEMS offers a solution for enhanced cooling in SSDs, enhancing their performance in crucial applications.
news.headline: xMEMS introduces µCooling fan-on-a-chip to SSDs, providing first in-drive active cooling for AI data centers and laptop PCs.

news.summary: Bitget has set an ambitious goal to become the first billion-user company in the crypto industry in the next two years. The Chief Operating Officer, Vugar Usi, revealed during an interview that the focus will be on everyday payments rather than trading to achieve this milestone. Usi emphasized that to reach a billion users, the sector should not solely target traders. Rather, the aim is to cater to the needs of everyday consumers who wish to conduct transactions, hold funds, and truly possess their money in the crypto space. Currently serving 100 million customers, Bitget is noted as the second-largest crypto exchange based on user count, with a daily trading volume of around $20 billion. This growth indicates a substantial expansion for the platform as it continues to pursue its vision of promoting financial independence over speculative activities.
news.headline: Bitget aims to become the first billion-user crypto company by focusing on everyday payments, not trading. They currently serve 100 million customers with $20 billion daily trading volume.

news.summary: Carrying out a poignant homage to the heroes of America's Greatest Generation, the Battleship Missouri Memorial along with the Pearl Harbor Aviation Museum have revealed a lineup of commemoration events marking the 80th anniversary of the end of World War II. This endeavor, set to take place in Honolulu, Hawaii, showcases a series of events paying tribute to this historic milestone.
news.headline: 80th Anniversary of WWII End Commemoration from Aug. 30 to Sept. 2 in Hawaii, thanks to Bob & Dolores Hope Foundation.

news.summary: In Lakewood, New Jersey on May 29, 2025, International Spice, a leading supplier of private label and gourmet seasonings, is encouraging grill enthusiasts and chefs to enhance their summer meals with a variety of custom-crafted blends as BBQ season begins.
news.headline: International Spice in Lakewood, N.J., offers custom seasonings for BBQ, enticing grill masters with global-inspired blends.

news.summary: In New York today, Wolters Kluwer revealed plans to conduct a targeted Open Innovation Hackathon aimed at investigating potential AI uses in international arbitration. The hackathon, organized by the Kluwer Arbitration team in partnership with the American Arbitration Association – International Centre for Dispute Resolution® (AAA-ICDR®), is scheduled to commence at 9am CEST on June 11, 2025. The venue for this event will be the Amare culture and conference center located in The Hague, The Netherlands. This initiative aims to bring together experts from various fields to collaborate on exploring innovative AI solutions for international arbitration.
news.headline: Wolters Kluwer hosts AI Hackathon for arbitration on June 11, 2025 in The Hague, Netherlands in collaboration with AAA-ICDR.

news.summary: In Dallas, MediaPSC, formerly known as The Plastic Surgery Channel, has revealed their new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) as Scott Jorgensen. Jorgensen, a member of the company's Board of Directors since 2010, possesses significant expertise in healthcare technology, finance, and digital media. The appointment of Jorgensen follows the company's rebranding and signals a shift in focus beyond plastic surgery. This move signifies a fresh start for MediaPSC as it ventures into new areas under Jorgensen's leadership.
news.headline: MediaPSC appoints Scott Jorgensen as new CEO, bringing extensive healthcare technology and finance leadership experience.
